message:
refactor(egraph): replace let-chains with guard clauses and reorder imports

Refactor nested let-chain patterns in egraph_to_jaxpr, id_to_atom, and
build_supported_segment_jaxpr to use early-continue/early-return guard
clauses for better readability. Reformat are_inverse_transposes match arm
as expression. Alphabetize egg and fj_core imports per rustfmt convention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
